opportunity_cost.note: Forgone risk-free yield on Polymarket-locked capital and wallet cash between positions. Subtracted from ROI/APY in the *_net_of_opp_cost fields below.

real_cash_terms.note: real_cash_final = sim_wallet_final - gross_premium - gas. Subtracts the external-cost outflows (insurance premium and gas) the sim does not deduct from the LP wallet. This is the metric to use when judging whether the strategy actually makes money on the same starting cash as a HODLer would have.

unhedged_active_lp.note: Reconstructed: strategy PnL minus insurance cost/payout/sellback and Polymarket execution costs (spread+slippage). Isolates the hedge's net contribution without rerunning the simulation.

mid_price_counterfactual.note: Derived from position-level spread_cost_* and slippage_cost_*. 'mid' is the recorded historical bet mid from DB.

db_mid_execution.note: Approx: adds back spread+slippage execution drag; does not re-simulate.

restore_to_anchor.note: headline ROI uses anchor_value_at_final + cumulative_unfilled_usd (insurance proceeds are netted into per-close restore_unfilled_usd).

warnings.message: Candle feed has gaps/anomalies; results are not strictly truthy.
